finding_results.notes: Replaced the repeated damp-hair/chlorine arrival cue with a different post-pool detail, so Lena's first entrance beat now lands on the fresh goggle-mark image instead of re-proving her chlorine signature.
Compressed the recurring room-screen references into neutral alternatives and kept the lone chlorine use in the bridge-obscenity beat. Verified post-revision counts: chlorine=1, display=0.

Added consequential material instead of filler: Lena's inside-account of desync is more explicit, and the wakeful aftermath now turns into a concrete decision to bring Yusuf, Margot, Park, and other symptomatic athletes into the same room. Verified chapter word count: 4593.

summary: Chapter 11 now swaps out the repeated chlorine/display tags for fresher scene texture, sharpens Lena's inside description of desync, and adds a concrete overnight decision that both raises pressure and cleanly feeds the chapter 12 group confrontation while bringing the chapter above the 4500-word floor.
